{"society_power": 4.0, "state_power": 8.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "Reformist defeat, IRGC/oil-rent consolidation, 2009 Green Movement crushed", "reasoning": "Oil rents, the IRGC's economic-coercive fusion, and entrenchment of unelected bodies pushed the despotic state upward, while society's latent capacity grew (youth, education, internet) but its formal channels were gutted and mass 2009 mobilization was violently suppressed\u2014leaving net society power flat despite rising underlying potential."}
